sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48182" key="qeo/qutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεό-θῠτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">θύω</etym>) <sense id="n48182.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">offered to the gods</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θεόθυτον, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a victim</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:417" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">417</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.), cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.29</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
